competitors.name: Zen Match - Relaxing Puzzle
competitors.notes: Acquired by Moon Active for ~$100-150M. 35M+ users. $900K monthly revenue (iOS). Freemium with lives/energy system — heavy friction. Booster costs 75+ coins per use. Zen Pass subscription available.

competitors.name: Triple Tile: Match Puzzle Game
competitors.notes: By Tripledot Studios. Very high rating (4.86). Monetizes primarily via ads; IAP is secondary. Strong brand in triple-tile genre.

competitors.name: Tile Match Sweet: Triple Match
competitors.notes: Ad-block deal at $2.99. Free anytime/offline. Simpler monetization. Lower brand recognition.

competitors.name: Shanghai Mahjong
competitors.notes: Premium paid app at $1.99. No IAP after purchase. 200 layouts, 50+ tilesets. Classic solitaire mahjong, not Onet-style. Niche loyal audience.

competitors.name: Onet Connect Plus
competitors.notes: Classic Onet-style connect game. Free with ads and IAP. Low production value but genre staple. No narrative or meta layer.

competitors.name: Lily's Garden: Match & Design
competitors.notes: By Tactile Games. 80K monthly downloads, $900K monthly revenue (iOS). 6-pack coin IAP from $0.99 to $74.99. Strong narrative + puzzle meta loop. Hybrid ads+IAP model. Key reference for garden/island meta.

competitors.name: June's Journey: Hidden Objects
competitors.notes: By wooga. 100K monthly downloads, $7M monthly revenue (iOS). Dual currency (diamonds + coins). 6-tier diamond packs $1.99-$99.99. Star loot boxes $7.99-$99.99. Strong narrative-driven meta. Clear benchmark for premium polish.

competitors.name: Merge Mansion: Mystery Puzzles
competitors.notes: By Metacore. ~$6M monthly revenue (iOS). Notable: no forced ads — full IAP model, positively reviewed for that. Event design complaints. Energy timer friction. Good reference for no-ad positioning.

competitors.name: Flow Free
competitors.notes: By Big Duck Games. Classic no-timer, no-lives puzzle. IAP = ad removal + extra puzzle packs. Beloved for clean, pressure-free design. Benchmark for no-stamina positioning.

differentiation_strengths: No stamina / no lives / no timer: Glow Island's core design philosophy directly addresses the #1 user complaint across Zen Match (wait 2.5h to retry), Lily's Garden (energy gates), and June's Journey (energy system). No competitor in the direct tile-connect category is positioned on this.

Single currency + continue-stage only IAP: Avoids the dual-currency confusion of June's Journey (diamonds + coins) and the manipulative booster ecosystem of Zen Match. Cleaner, fairer perceived value. Players can trust the economy.

Narrative + island restoration meta in tile-connect: Zen Match and Triple Tile lack narrative depth entirely. Lily's Garden and June's Journey have narrative but use match-3 or hidden object mechanics. Glow Island is the only healing Onet/tile-connect game with a 6-chapter island restoration story — a blue ocean niche.

gap_warnings.gap: Crash analytics / stability monitoring not yet integrated (Firebase Crashlytics or equivalent)
gap_warnings.competitor_example: All top competitors (Zen Match, Lily's Garden, June's Journey) treat crash-free launch as table stakes; even one crash wave tanks early App Store ratings

gap_warnings.gap: In-app rating prompt (SKStoreReviewRequestAPI) not confirmed implemented
gap_warnings.competitor_example: Merge Mansion (4.56★/182K ratings) and Triple Tile (4.86★/250K ratings) both use well-timed review prompts post positive moments; missing this at launch is leaving rating velocity on the table

gap_warnings.gap: No ad-removal IAP or subscription option (competitors like Flow Free, Tile Match Sweet offer $2.99 ad-block)
gap_warnings.competitor_example: Flow Free (ad-block $0.99–$2.99), Tile Match Sweet ($2.99 no-ads deal) — if Glow Island ever introduces rewarded ads, players expect a buy-out option

gap_warnings.gap: No daily challenge / streak mechanic for retention (Zen Match has daily tile explorer; Lily's Garden has daily quests)
gap_warnings.competitor_example: Zen Match Daily Tile Explorer, Lily's Garden daily events — drives D7/D30 retention significantly; absent in Glow Island spec

gap_warnings.gap: No social / leaderboard / sharing hook (June's Journey has competitive flower collection events; Merge Mansion has seasonal leaderboards)
gap_warnings.competitor_example: June's Journey competitive flower-finding events drive community and UA virality; not required at launch but valuable for scale

tiers.label: 小包
tiers.rationale_note: Entry tier anchored at market floor ($0.99); matches Lily's Garden smallest pack and Onet Connect entry; covers ~1 continue use; impulse buy for casual spenders

tiers.label: 中包
tiers.rationale_note: Mid tier at industry median for casual puzzle IAP; matches Tile Match Sweet ad-block price and Zen Match Piggy Bank tier; covers 2-3 continues; best-value perception for committed players

tiers.label: 大包
tiers.rationale_note: High-value tier; $4.99 is the most common 'committed casual' price across Lily's Garden, June's Journey, and Zen Match; 17% bonus over linear scaling drives upgrade from mid tier

tiers.label: 超值包
tiers.rationale_note: Whale entry tier; $9.99 is the universal whale-entry price across all surveyed competitors (Zen Match $9.99 bundle, June's Journey $9.99 pack, Lily's Garden); 30% bonus over $4.99 linear rate; avoids $14.99+ that triggers price sensitivity in casual segment

pricing_recommendation.rationale: Price tiers are derived from cross-competitor analysis: entry at $0.99 (Lily's Garden, Onet Connect), mid at $2.99-$4.99 (Zen Match, Triple Tile, Merge Mansion), whale entry at $9.99 (Zen Match, June's Journey, Lily's Garden). Glow Island's single-currency, single-IAP-trigger model (continue-stage only) positions it as the most transparent economy in the competitive set — lean into 'fair pricing' as brand value. No high-pressure whale bundles above $9.99 at launch; the $0.99 to $9.99 range covers 85%+ of casual IAP spenders. Coin values are calibrated so $0.99 covers ~1 continue, creating visible value at every tier. Adjust continue cost to 45-55 Sand Coins post-launch via server config based on conversion data.
